## Summary
Describe the problem or request in 1–2 sentences.

## Type of Issue
- Bug
- Feature request
- Documentation
- Other (please specify):

## Description
Provide more context on what is happening.

## Files Changed
List each file changed and summarize the implementation.

## Expected Behavior
Describe the expected outcome.

## Actual Behavior
Describe the current outcome.

## Screenshots / Logs
If applicable, add screenshots or logs to help explain the problem.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, links, or references here.
